who: compliance officers in accounting firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month
offer: For compliance officers in accounting firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month, manual data entry causes late submissions. We automate data collection and form generation instead of manual data entry and form submission.
problem: Manual data collection and form generation for regulatory filings.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for compliance officers
Share insights on Indie Hackers related to workflows
DM outreach to compliance officers with demo video
Engage in community forums for compliance tools
try_it: Let users try data collection templates and form generation tools on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
